headline: Trump 🍊🦅 DOUBLES DOWN on Greenland GRAB 💥❄️ – NO TURNING BACK ⏹️🔥
text:
Trump 🍊🦅 Daddy-in-Chief is DROPPING BOMBS 💣📢 at Davos ❄️🏔️, doubling DOWN HARDER 😤🍆 on GREENLAND TAKEOVER ❄️🇺🇸 – 'NO GOING BACK ⏹️🚫, you'll FIND OUT 😏👀!' Air Force One 💺✈️ had a lil ELECTRICAL GLITCH ⚡😵 forcing a U-TURN 🌀😂 but Donnie landed LATE AF 🌙🛬 for WEF SLAY 📈, scheduling TONSA MEETINGS 🗓️🤝 on that ICY THICC PIECE 🍑❄️ – 'Things gonna WORK OUT PRETTY WELL 😎💦!' 

Macron 🥐😤 warning of 'WORLD WITHOUT RULES 🌍🚫' like a salty baguette 🍞🧂, while Carney 🍁📈 cries 'OLD ORDER DEAD 💀📉!' Trump claps BACK 👏: 'NOBODY DID MORE FOR NATO 🛡️🇺🇸 THAN ME, bros HAPPY 😄🤝 – but DO THEY GOT MY BACK? 🤔🫵 I rescue THEM 🦸‍♂️, but they'll GHOST US? 😱' Remember 9/11 🔥🗽 when NATO invoked ARTICLE 5 🛡️💥 for USA – only time EVER! Now 32 members 🥳, but Trump Qs if they'll RIDE OR DIE 🏍️💨. Won't RULE OUT MILITARY FORCE ⚔️💣 – 'NO COMMENT 🤐' to NBC, straight GANGSTA 😤🔫!

Greenland MINISTER Naaja 😩❄️ BEWILDERED AF 🤯: 'We NO WANT BE AMERICANS 🇺🇸🚫, what about OUR CULTURE 🛸❄️ & SELF-DETERMINE 🗳️?' Trump flexing TEXTS 📱💬 from Macron 'WTF u doing? 🤨🥐' offering PARIS MEET 👥🍷, Rutte 'COMMITTED 🤝❄️!' Von der Leyen 👩‍💼🇪🇺 SLAMMING 'FULL SOLIDARITY 🫂 with Greenland/Denmark 🇩🇰❄️ – SOVEREIGNTY NON-NEGOTIABLE 🚫💎!' Calls Trump TARIFFS 'MISTAKE 😤' but EU READY WITH TRADE BAZOOKA 💥🔫 anti-coercion TOOL!

Trump THREATENING 10% TARIFFS 🚫💰 on 8 EU countries from Feb 1 ❄️📅 if they COCKBLOCK Greenland GRAB 🛑🍑, plus 200% on FRENCH WINE 🥂🍷💸 cuz Macron ghosted Gaza PEACE BOARD 📋☮️! Macron RAGING 'RESPECT OVER BULLIES 🥊🚫, LAW OVER BRUTALITY ⚖️😡' – EU plotting RETALIATION 🔥🇪🇺, suspending US TRADE DEAL ✋📜 for ESCALATION ORGY 💥👯‍♂️! Carney echoing 'UNWAVERING ARTICLE 5 🛡️🍁, STAND WITH GREENLAND 🫡❄️!' Davos turning into TARIFF THROWDOWN 🥊💰 – Trump vs World 🦅🌍, who's the ALPHA DADDY? 😍🍆 Wall Street simps sweating 😰📉 but Donnie's like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🥺🍔' – GREENLAND OR BUST 💥❄️🇺🇸‼️
